text: So grateful for this place! The staff is amazing, professional, knowledgeable and accommodating. The establishment itself is squeaky clean and has a relaxed feel to it. Julius at Otay Ranch is my tech and I couldn’t be happier. He makes you feel comfortable and is very patient. I highly recommend Removery for your tattoo removal services.
author: Amor Hernandez

text:
I had my eyebrow tattoos removed here and couldn’t be happier with my experience! From start to finish, the team was incredibly kind, professional, and informative. They took the time to explain the process, answer all my questions, and made me feel completely comfortable.
The results honestly exceeded my expectations and my brows were fully removed after the session, and I’m so happy with how everything turned out. You can tell they really care about their clients and the quality of their work.
I highly recommend them to anyone considering laser tattoo removal. Such a great experience all around!
author: Jessica Kashou

text: It doesnt hurt as bad as you guys would think, this is the best to do it painless and professional, very welcoming and family type of vibe when you walk in and amaIng service

text: Consistently I have an appointment and when I show up they are running 20-30 minutes behind schedule. The first time I thought it was a fluke but this is the third time in a row and now I am quite frustrated with this location especially considering you pay up front, so now I am stuck going to a place that is CONSTANTLY running behind schedule. Highly disappointed with this company and location. They need to start adding buffer room are turn away clients if they show up late. Something must change with HHQ policy.
author: Sarah McCann

text: Super friendly, make me feel comfortable, thoroughly explain the process, and verryyy clean location! I have had no complaints at all; i’ve been coming here for a year already! :)

text:
I decided to start laser tattoo removal because I had a tattoo that no longer represents who I am today. It was meaningful at one point in my life, but as I’ve grown and changed, it just didn’t reflect me anymore. I wanted a fresh start, and choosing Removery was honestly one of the best decisions I made.

From the very beginning, the experience has been smooth and reassuring. Cali at the front office was incredibly helpful and welcoming. She provided detailed information during my free initial consultation and made sure all my questions were answered. I never felt rushed or pressured, which made me feel confident moving forward.

Julius has been amazing throughout this entire process. He is very thorough, professional, and always takes the time to explain what to expect before and after each session. The treatments themselves are almost painless, much easier than I anticipated. He makes sure I’m comfortable the whole time.

I’ve had almost seven sessions so far, and the results are definitely noticeable. My tattoo has significantly faded, and I’ve had no issues with healing at all. The aftercare instructions are clear, and everything has healed smoothly each time.

Overall, I highly recommend Removery. The staff is knowledgeable, supportive, and truly cares about your experience. If you’re thinking about removing a tattoo that no longer fits your story, this is the place to go.
author: Aubrey Brion

text: The staff at Removery Chula Vista are always so kind and have made this experience a breeze! Thx

text: I found Removery when I had a bad experience in Tijuana with my tattoo removal. When I made the switch to Removery it was night and day difference. Cali got me all set up with payment and information about everything. The Rooms are always spotless and and orderly. Foujan and Julius do the actual service and they were so so sweet and attentive. Their expertise and consideration towards the client goes above and beyond , I always feel safe and well taken care of.

text: Julius & Cali are amazing! Always super nice. Ever since I came in for a consultation, Cali made sure to have a removal plan especially made for me, with a discount of a few hundred dollars. The payment plans are also very flexible, and again, personalized to my needs. Julius is gentle with the laser, he makes sure you’re safe and not having too much pain in the process. I always leave with a care package that they provide and happy because the fading is more noticeable each time! ✨
author: Mizar Martin

text: I have been to the Chula Vista Removery 4 times now & I am just now finished with 1 round of ALL the tattoos I am removing.  Cali & Julius are absolutely fantastic, as people & professionals!  They are very welcoming, kind, calming & the best at what they do.  I am floored at how much ink is gone after just 1 session on all these tats.  I have been to other places & Removery is THE place to go for tattoo removal.  Less pain, less cost, way more effective!  Hands down the best.
author: Christine DeFilippo

text: I love this Removery location! No matter the day I come in, I have the best experience every time. The entire staff takes care of me, Cali, Julius, and Alison are the best and always make sure I have an awesome experience! They even give me lollipops lol thank you guys!
